name: You
text: Ana sent me. She found the photograph but can't remember.

name: Fisherman
text: He built half this village. She built the other half.

name: Fisherman
text: Grandad always said she was the one with the plan. He was just the one who believed it.

name: You
text: She remembers someone in the front of the photo. Serious face.

name: Fisherman
text: That's him. Arms crossed, never smiling in photos.

name: Fisherman
text: But at home... he never stopped talking about this place.

name: Fisherman
text: Tell her his name was Perica. Tell her he never forgot either.
